Rabbit Hole Key Quest

Collect 6 keys, answer each question, avoid double the spiders and Cheshire cats, then unlock the door.
Keys: 0/6
Score: 0
Lives: 3
Questions: 0/6
Door: Locked

Key Question

Down the Rabbit Hole

Help Alice collect 6 golden keys. Each key opens a health question about nicotine and vaping. Answer correctly to keep the key. Reach the door after all 6 keys to win.

Controls: Arrow keys, WASD, or the touch arrows on mobile. Avoid spiders and cats. Touching an enemy costs one life.

Door Unlocked!

You collected all 6 keys and escaped Wonderland with better health knowledge.

Tap Music: Off to start the soundtrack. Mobile browsers usually require one tap before audio can play.
Teacher note: Correct answers award 100 points and keep the key. Wrong answers give feedback, but the key returns to the maze.
